sqlMap.select: select * from prod where prod_id in (select prod_id from interested_items where mem_id = #mem_id#)
sqlMap.delete: delete interested_items where prod_id = #prod_id# and mem_id=#mem_id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into detail_order values((select order_id from mem_order where order_status is null and mem_id = #mem_id#), #prod_id#, null, 1, (select prod_price from prod where prod_id = #prod_id#))
